headline: Is Dollar Tree (DLTR) Undervalued On Its New US$2.5b Buyback?
summary: Dollar Tree (DLTR) is back in focus after the company expanded its equity buyback authorization to US$2.5b on July 1, 2026. This move has drawn fresh attention to the stock’s capital return approach. See our latest analysis for Dollar Tree. The buyback decision comes after a strong 90 day share price return of 25.47% and a 1 month share price return of 13.23%. By contrast, the year to date share price return is slightly down 2.18% and the 3 year total shareholder return is down 15.55%,...
